songs.title: Can't Keep My Hands Off You (feat. Rivers Cuomo)
feed: “Can't Keep My Hands Off You (feat. Rivers Cuomo)” by Simple Plan spends a 3rd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Can't Keep My Hands Off You (feat. Rivers Cuomo)” by Simple Plan is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 11,816 sales units.
“Can't Keep My Hands Off You (feat. Rivers Cuomo)” by Simple Plan is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 67,567,500 streams units.
“Can't Keep My Hands Off You (feat. Rivers Cuomo)” by Simple Plan is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 333,151 total units.
